text: Artificial intelligence is changing how we live and work, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias: if AI is trained on biased data, it may make unfair decisions, such as in hiring or loan approvals. Fairness requires us to design systems that treat all people equally. Privacy is another key issue—AI often collects personal information, so we must protect people's data and respect their consent. Transparency means that how AI reaches its decisions should be clear and understandable to users. Finally, responsible AI development calls for continuous monitoring and accountability, ensuring that technology benefits everyone without causing harm.
